entry.title: Replying to @Tomo 5222 they got take away (which is cheaper) but then sat down with it is the gist. several morals here: 1. always be kind to people just doing their jobs 2. you never know who youre sat next to it might just be zoë bread pretending to fi

entry.title: i have been secretly making this for so long !!! the next video i upload will hopefully be my music video and song, but i still havent finished the video and the song is being mixed! also since all the music has now been recorded and isnt ripped straight

entry.title: corkacabana (at the corka!) unlike the last cover i did this one is 100% original IE none of poor barry manilow’s music was pinched for it! i have to thank jack en parpes and gary meanburg for helping me with the piano parts, drums and mixing !!! corky is
entry.content: corkacabana (at the corka!) unlike the last cover i did this one is 100% original IE none of poor barry manilow’s music was pinched for it! i have to thank jack en parpes and gary meanburg for helping me with the piano parts, drums and mixing !!! corky is

entry.title: new behind the scenes vlog guy up on my U choob channel !! if you have any interest in the progess of building new cork city you might enjoy it if not its genuinely so irritating i dont recommend it. possibly worst video ive ever made and its 1.5 hours lo
entry.content: new behind the scenes vlog guy up on my U choob channel !! if you have any interest in the progess of building new cork city you might enjoy it if not its genuinely so irritating i dont recommend it. possibly worst video ive ever made and its 1.5 hours lo

entry.title: see you in hell is like we are both bad little sinner guys and illl see you down there!!! there will be loads of people and itll be quite hot presumably but ill try and find you, i cant wait !!

entry.title: i thought the numbers were funny. i just think theyre neat. also they still suck for stressing me out and passing me to a debt collector 😡😡😡 check your bills make sense 😡😡😡
